docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-07-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT TAYLOR SAMANTHA WHITE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
